title: Edwards, Ruth - Assistant Government Whip - Cabinet Office
body: "Ms Edwards left her role as Assistant Government Whip in April 2024  10 Years Ahead The Chair of ACOBA wrote to Ms Edwards about announcing this independent consultancy before recieving advice. Read the correspondence between Ms Edwards and ACOBA about the breach here. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here.  ACOBA wrote to the Cabinet Office reporting a breach of the governemnt’s Business Appointment Rules. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here. "
